creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Hello,

I can't compile nginx-devel with BROTLI=on anymore because the move from devel/libbrotli to archivers/brotli has only been done for "nginx", not "nginx-devel": https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=445607

If needed, I'll post the error message later (I don't have it handy).

Best Regards,
Olivier
